description: Vertical graphic combining a news-outlet headline header with a photograph. The top portion is a white band carrying the maroon 'EdNC' (EducationNC) logo and a bold black serif headline: 'U.S. Department of Education moves many programs to other agencies ‘to break up federal bureaucracy’'. The lower two-thirds is a color photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit, white shirt and red striped tie, standing and clapping inside an industrial facility with an overhead crane and large rolled steel coils on a yellow rack at right marked '07'. Behind him a crowd of people in orange high-visibility jackets and hard hats are cheering and photographing him; a blue banner at right reads 'AMERI...'. A faint circular agency watermark sits at lower left.
notable_text: U.S. Department of Education moves many programs to other agencies ‘to break up federal bureaucracy’; EdNC
